name: Bio Research Team
address: 207 Giai Phong Road, Hai Ba Trung District, Hanoi, Vietnam

research_areas.title: Molecular AI & Drug Discovery
research_areas.desc: Deep learning on molecular representations (SMILES sequences and molecular graphs) for drug property prediction — including toxicity screening, bioactivity, and ADMET profiling using multimodal fusion architectures.

research_areas.title: Physiological Signal Analysis
research_areas.desc: Deep learning models for early clinical risk prediction from intraoperative and physiological time-series signals — including AKI and haemodynamic deterioration detection to support real-time surgical decision support.
